sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_punycode (id UInt32, name String);
INSERT INTO test_punycode (id, name) VALUES (1, punycodeEncode('München'));
INSERT INTO test_punycode (id, name) VALUES (2, punycodeEncode('café'));
SELECT id, punycodeEncode(name) AS encoded_name FROM test_punycode WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_punycode SET name = punycodeEncode('naïve') WHERE id = 2;
